scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,manage,api,worker -c cyan,blue,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w manage" "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run worker:dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w manage && npm run build -w backend
scripts.docker:refresh: sh ./scripts/docker-compose.sh up -d --build --force-recreate --remove-orphans migrate api bullmq-worker frontend manage
